violations.text: The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025

The (ceiling ) in the (walk in cooler ) area is in poor repair.Observed drywall and exposed insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025
Lights under the hood system observed in poor repair(missing light bulbs). New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
